title: Copywriting Services Agreement
description: A freelance writing contract detailing the scope of copy deliverables (web copy, blog posts, ad scripts), flat fees, revision loops, and copyright release.
whatsCovered: Defined writing deliverables and word count guidelines
Flat fee invoicing and deposit payment timeline
Round of revisions limitations (preventing scope creep)
Full transfer of copyrights upon receipt of payment
Portfolio rights allowing display of draft work
whenToUse: Use this contract when you are hired as a copywriter, blogger, or content marketer to write copy for a business client.

fields.label: Description of Deliverables
fields.placeholder: Describe the articles, sales pages, or blog posts to write...

clauses.heading: COPYWRITING SERVICES AGREEMENT
clauses.body: This Copywriting Services Agreement (the "Agreement") is entered into as of {effective_date} (the "Effective Date"), by and between {copywriter_name}, located at {copywriter_address} ("Copywriter"), and {client_name}, located at {client_address} ("Client").

clauses.heading: 1. Writing Deliverables
clauses.body: Copywriter agrees to write and deliver the following copy: {writing_deliverables}. All drafts shall be submitted in electronic text format (Google Docs, Word, or Markdown).

clauses.heading: 2. Revisions and Feedback
clauses.body: Client is entitled to up to {revisions_count} rounds of revisions based on the initial brief, provided such feedback is submitted within 10 business days of receiving the draft. Additional revision rounds shall be billed at $75.00 per hour.

clauses.heading: 3. Service Fee & Deposit
clauses.body: Client shall pay Copywriter a flat fee of {flat_fee} for the deliverables. A 50% deposit is due prior to project kickoff, and the final 50% balance is due within 15 days of final approval.

clauses.heading: 4. Intellectual Property Release
clauses.body: Upon receipt of full and final payment, Copywriter hereby transfers all copyrights and intellectual property ownership in the approved copy to Client. Client may publish, edit, and repurpose the copy without attribution.

clauses.heading: 4.1 Portfolio Display Rights
clauses.body: Copywriter retains the right to display portions of the approved copy in Copywriter's professional portfolio and case studies, except for proprietary/confidential business info.

clauses.heading: 5. Governing Law
clauses.body: This Agreement shall be governed and interpreted according to the laws of the State/Country of {governing_state}.

faq.question: What happens if I change the scope mid-project?
faq.answer: If you add deliverables not included in the initial brief, they will be billed separately as 'out of scope' work at the copywriter's standard hourly rate.

faq.question: Who owns the copy if I cancel early?
faq.answer: The copywriter retains all rights to any draft materials. Rights only transfer to the client upon full payment of the final invoice.
